description_cn: 将一组点拉向曲线（在曲线上产生曲线外一点的最近点）。将选定点限制在指定的曲线上。强度越高，点的吸附就越贴合曲线。
description_en: Pull a set of points toward the curve (creating the closest point to a point outside the curve on the curve). Restrict selected points to a specified curve. The higher the intensity, the more closely the points adhere to the curve.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
